name: The Variety Department, Unintentionally
overview: On his first day of work, Seung-chan is interviewed by “Documentary 3 Days” for a feature on working at KBS and gets a taste of his complex new job.

name: News of Quitting, Unintentionally
overview: Jun-mo has to orchestrate bad news, Cindy stops by her ruthless agent’s office and Seung-chan struggles to get toner cartridge for the team printer.

name: Pheasant Instead of Chicken, Unintentionally
overview: Seung-chan feels hated at work, Ye-jin frets about paying for car repairs and the “Two Days and One Night” team tries a new concept.

name: Acting That Way, Unintentionally
overview: Seung-chan’s team tests new games for the show relaunch, Ye-jin gets a notice from the communications commission and Cindy takes a calculated risk.

name: Understanding Editing
overview: Cindy gets a hard lesson about herself, Jun-mo takes a stand and Ye-jin has too much to drink. Seung-chan learns the ins and outs of food delivery.

name: Understanding Broadcast Accidents
overview: Seung-chan confronts Jun-mo, Ye-jin confides in Seung-chan and Cindy wants to try a new sweet public persona after running into saintly Lee Seung-gi.

name: Understanding Media Play
overview: Ye-jin and Jun-mo get an unexpected visitor, Seung-chan works on his poker face and rumors start flying when Cindy goes missing.

name: Understanding Love Lines
overview: Seung-chan’s reaction confuses Cindy, the entertainment department takes part in the annual sports meet and Go A-ra visits the show.

name: Understanding Preemptions
overview: Seung-chan helps Ye-jin move into her new place, “Two Days and One Night” gets bumped, Jun-mo resolves not to lose his spot and Cindy has doubts.

name: Understanding Previews
overview: Jun-mo is unsure if he wants to let go, Seung-chan tries editing, Cindy shows her hand and Ye-jin thinks she’s good at reading situations.

name: Understanding Ratings
overview: Seung-chan doesn’t want to lose hope, Jun-mo wonders if producers get to decide, Ye-jin seeks relationship advice and Cindy deals with bad press.

name: Understanding Long Running Programs
overview: The team questions Jun-mo’s decision, Seung-chan wants a reshoot, Cindy’s conflict with Byun comes to a head and the show’s future is unclear.
